prompt: Build a Stream Deck Plus tool that controls Google Meet. I want three buttons: one to toggle my mic mute (shows 🎤 when live, 🔇 when muted), one to toggle my camera (shows 📷 when on, 🚫 when off), and one to hang up. It should detect whether Chrome is focused on a Meet call using osascript and update the button states. When I'm not in a call, the buttons should look dimmed/grey.
assertions: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
osascript is used to detect Chrome/Meet state
Three separate button indices are used for mic, camera, and hang up
Button rendering uses sharp to produce raw RGB buffers
setInterval polling is present to continuously update button state
deck.on('down') handler is present for button presses
Different colors/icons used for active vs inactive (in-call vs not-in-call) states
